description_long: This is a dark brown ceramic cup with a conical shape, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The cup has a single, rounded handle attached to one side, ergonomically designed for gripping. On the front, there is a stylized logo of a steaming cup with the text 'CC JITTERS' in gold and white, adding a touch of branding and visual interest. The interior of the cup is a contrasting light gray, suggesting a glazed finish for easy cleaning. The cup's rim is wide and circular, tapering down to a narrower base, typical of modern coffee cups. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for serving hot beverages in urban cafes or kitchens.
description: A dark brown ceramic cup with a handle and a 'CC JITTERS' logo, featuring a light gray interior and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'CC JITTERS' logo and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle most visible and the logo partially out of sight.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the handle on the left and the logo fully visible.
description_view_3: Rear view with no handle or logo visible, just the plain brown surface.
